seo.keywords: ForcedSkin, browser theme, web skin, dark mode extension, light theme, Chrome extension, forced skin

home.title: Force Every Website Into Your Favorite Colors
home.description: ForcedSkin applies your chosen color theme to any website. Browser extension plus theme marketplace — switch light and dark freely, sync across devices when you log in.
home.og_description: Apply your favorite light or dark palette to any website. Extensions plus marketplace with cross-device sync.

themes.title: Theme Marketplace
themes.description: Browse the ForcedSkin theme marketplace. Discover light and dark palettes you can apply to any website in one click.
themes.og_description: Discover curated themes, favorite them, and sync to the ForcedSkin browser extension to reskin any site.
themes.ld_description: Browse light and dark themes for ForcedSkin

adapters.title: Site Adapters
adapters.description: Community-maintained site adapters help ForcedSkin theme results feel more natural on popular websites.
adapters.og_description: Browse community adapters for more precise forced-theming support on your favorite sites.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: ForcedSkin Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.og_description: How ForcedSkin handles your data across the website and browser extension.

terms.og_description: Terms and conditions for using ForcedSkin.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.description: Sign in with GitHub or Google to manage favorite themes and sync them to the ForcedSkin browser extension.

account.title: My Account
account.description: Manage ForcedSkin favorite themes and your selected light/dark palettes, synced with the signed-in extension.

guide_theme.title: Theme Authoring Guide
guide_theme.description: Learn how to design custom themes for ForcedSkin: JSON structure, palette fields, and submission flow.
guide_theme.og_description: Color field specification, gradients, and how to publish community themes.

guide_adapter.title: Adapter Development Guide
guide_adapter.description: ForcedSkin adapters use declarative JSON formulas (forcedskin-adapter-formula/v1): matching rules and layers.
guide_adapter.og_description: Declarative adapter JSON, hostname matching, and submission flow.
